title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses the emergence of autonomous coding agents and demonstrates the /goal feature for directing AI-assisted development workflows. The video covers how to set up and prompt goals for autonomous coding tasks, including long-horizon mission exploration capabilities.
